description_long: This object is a vintage gramophone-style stereo sound system, featuring a large, flared metallic horn in a copper tone mounted on a wooden box base. The base is constructed from dark, textured wood and includes decorative elements such as a star emblem on one side and a visible crank handle for manual operation. The horn is supported by a curved metal arm, and the turntable platform is visible on the top surface, likely made of a dark material. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century phonographs, with a blend of wood and metal materials. The object exudes an antique aesthetic, suitable for display or use in retro-themed urban environments.
description: A vintage gramophone-style stereo sound system with a large copper horn and a dark wooden base, featuring a crank handle and decorative star emblem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the copper horn, the wooden base, and the curved supporting arm.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the horn, the crank handle, and the plain wooden back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the horn, the star emblem on the wooden base, and the crank handle.
description_view_3: Front view looking directly into the horn, with the turntable platform and a small rectangular panel on the base visible.
